debug_info.goal:
S : Set ℝ
h₁ : S = {x | (¬∃ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, x = ↑n) ∧ 5 / 4 ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, ↑k / (x - ↑k)}
⊢ ∃ l r n,
    (∀ k < n, l k < r k) ∧
      (∀ k < n - 1, r k < l (k + 1)) ∧
        ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (r k - l k) = 1988 ∧ S = ⋃ k ∈ Finset.range n, Set.Ioc (l k) (r k)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let n := 70
  let ι := Finset.Icc 1 n
  let p : ℝ[X] := Polynomial.C (5/4) * ∏ i in ι, (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C (i : ℝ)) -
    ∑ i in ι, (Polynomial.C (i : ℝ) * ∏ j in ι.erase i, (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C (j : ℝ)))
  have h_roots : ∃ r : ℕ → ℝ, (∀ i < n, p.IsRoot (r i) ∧ (i + 1 < r i) ∧ (i < n - 1 → r i < i + 2)) ∧
    (S = ⋃ k ∈ Finset.range n, Set.Ioc (k + 1 : ℝ) (r k)) ∧ (∑ i in Finset.range n, r i = 9/5 * ∑ i in ι, (i : ℝ)) := sorry
  obtain ⟨r, hr_root, hr_S, hr_sum⟩ := h_roots
  refine ⟨λ k, k + 1, r, n, λ k hk, (hr_root k hk).2.1, λ k hk, (hr_root k hk).2.2 hk, ?_, hr_S⟩
  rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib, hr_sum, Finset.sum_range_add_one_eq_sum_Icc, ← sub_mul]
  norm_num; rw [Finset.sum_Icc_id]; norm_num
